title: Introduction of a UK carbon border adjustment mechanism from January 2027
bodyHtml:
As of 2027, the United Kingdom will implement a Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism (CBAM). Initially, this measure will be implemented in the aluminum, cement, ceramics, fertilizer, glass, hydrogen, iron, and steel sectors. As of March 21, 2024, the public consultation process has been initiated.

In this context, you can submit your views on the UK CBAM until June 13, 2024, through the following link: https://www.gov.uk/government/consultations/consultation-on-theintroduction-of-a-uk-carbon-border-adjustment-mechanism.

Click here for the summary document regarding the implementation.
